tagline: Banded rows in tables: Tables can now display banded rows.
what_it_does: Banded rows in tables: Tables can now display banded rows. Custom geographies in maps: Custom geographies are now available in choropleth and point maps. Genie Code for dashboard authoring: Genie Code for dashboard authoring is now generally available.
why_it_matters: Custom calculations are one of the following types: Calculated measures: Aggregated values such as total sales or average cost.
plain_summary: Banded rows in tables: Tables can now display banded rows. Custom geographies in maps: Custom geographies are now available in choropleth and point maps.

capabilities.title: The optional INCLUSIVE keyword includes
capabilities.desc: The optional INCLUSIVE keyword includes the current row in the range. EXCLUSIVE excludes it. Defaults to EXCLUSIVE.

capabilities.title: Example: TRAILING 7 DAY INCLUSIVE
capabilities.desc: Example: TRAILING 7 DAY INCLUSIVE or LEADING 1 MONTH

key_takeaway: Banded rows in tables: Tables can now display banded rows.
